title: Pack for Dr Donut
description: simple texture pack that replaces stone ores, andesite, diorite, and granite with the standard stone texture, while deepslate ores Bedrock and tuff use the deepslate texture.
body:
## **Pack for Dr Donut**
A simple texture pack that replaces stone ores, andesite, diorite, and granite with the standard stone texture, while deepslate ores Bedrock and tuff use the deepslate texture.


_Disclaimer: This is a fan-made texture pack and is not officially created by or affiliated with Dr Donut._
